en.title: Advanced Rust & Systems Programming
en.description: Master concurrency, async/await with Tokio, unsafe Rust, FFI, macros, smart pointers, and build high-performance production systems.

pt.title: Rust Avançado e Programação de Sistemas
pt.description: Domine concorrência, async/await com Tokio, Rust inseguro, FFI, macros, smart pointers e construa sistemas de produção de alta performance.
